title: Implementing a RESTful API with Express
description: Build a CRUD API for a resource using Express.

slides.title: Setting Up the Project 🚀
slides.content:
# Building an API

We'll create a simple API for a `books` resource using Express and an in-memory array (database later).

```bash
npm init -y
npm install express
```

Create `app.js`:

slides.title: GET All and GET One
POST – Create a New Book
PUT – Update (Replace) a Book
PATCH – Partial Update and DELETE

quizData.question: What status code should be returned after successfully creating a resource with POST?
quizData.explanation: 201 Created is the standard response for successful resource creation.
